description.string_value: This is a huge turn for the USA ahead of its World Cup round of 16 match against Belgium.

title.string_value: USA Star Folarin Balogun Cleared To Play In World Cup Match vs. Belgium

tweet.full_text:
BREAKING: FIFA has cleared the way for U.S. star Folarin Balogun to play in the USA's round of 16 match vs Belgium on Monday, confirmed by FOX Sports' @ByDougMcIntyre and @MelissaMOrtiz 

https://t.co/eAJEpu9L5l
